description_blurb:
This document is a Mission Report (MISREP), a standardized reporting form the U.S. Military uses to record the circumstances surrounding its operations. U.S. military services often use MISREPs to report Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) to AARO. The GENTEXT, or “general text” section of these reports often contains important qualitative, contextual information, distinguishing it from the more quantitative, or numerical, data found elsewhere in the report.
A U.S. military operator reported observing a UAP “flying just above the surface of the ocean.” The report describes the UAP as taking “multiple 90-degree turns at an estimated 80 mph.”
All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
title: DOW-UAP-D33, Mission Report, Greece, October 2023
summary: A U.S. military operator observed a UAP flying just above the surface of the ocean water. The UAP took multiple 90-degree turns at an estimated 80 MPH before being lost from the feed.
reported_object_description: SEEMINGLY CIRCULAR, TOO SMALL TO MAKE OUT DETAILS
reported_behavior: flying just above the surface of the ocean water, took multiple 90 degree turns at an estimated 80 MPH
full_text:
# DOW-UAP-D33, Mission Report, Greece, October 2023 - Page 1

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 22 January 2026

# Misrep 9329374

## Narrative

[redacted]

AT 2339Z [redacted] TOOK OFF FROM LGLR. AT 2352Z, [1.4a] HANDED OVER FROM THE LRE. [1.4a] PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING TO SUPPORT DATA MASKED.

AT 0013Z, [1.4a] WAS 7-LINED TO SUPPORT DATA MASKED. [1.4a] ARRIVED ON-STATION AT 0342Z, CHECKED IN WITH DATA MASKED, AND PERFORMED FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 36S YC 4[1.4a]5[1.4a] (SEE ISR 1).

AT 0035Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED 1X POSS UAP (SEE UAP 1).

AT 1011Z, [1.4a] RETURNED TO BASE. AT 1213Z, [1.4a] HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 1309Z, [1.4a] LANDED AT OJMS. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY GET. 13:30 MISSION HOURS, 06:29 FMV HOURS, 1X FMV TASKINGS PROSECUTED.

[redacted]

([redacted]) Mission Narrative

## Admin

[3.5c, (b)(6)]

### GENTEXT/ISR

*   **Gentext:** [redacted]
UPON ARRIVAL TO THE SP AT 0413Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED NO EEI RELATED ACTIVITY. BETWEEN 0413Z AND 1011Z, [1.4a] SHIFTED EYES TO MULTIPLE COI CONDUCTING POL, IDENTIFYING OBSTRUCTIONS TO HLZS, ROUTE ANALYSIS, AND CHARACTERIZING HUMAN OR VEHICLE TRAFFIC. [1.4a] CONDUCTED POL ON MULTIPLE COIS UNTIL RTB AT 1011Z.
[redacted]

summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观察到一UAP在海面正上方飞行。该UAP以估计80英里/小时的速度进行了多次90度转弯，随后从信号源中消失。
reported_object_description_zh: 疑似圆形，过小无法辨别细节
reported_behavior_zh: 在海面正上方飞行，以估计80英里/小时的速度进行了多次90度转弯
claims: UAP observed flying just above the surface of the ocean water
UAP moved at an estimated 80 MPH
UAP was too small to make out details
claims_zh: 观察到UAP在海面正上方飞行
UAP以估计80英里/小时的速度移动
